properties.SQL Query:
SELECT

-- =========================
-- CONTRIBUABLE
-- =========================
c.id                         AS c_id,
c.nif                        AS c_nif,
c.type_entite                AS c_type_entite,
c.type_personne_statut       AS c_type_personne_statut,
c.resident_fiscal            AS c_resident_fiscal,
c.date_arrivee               AS c_date_arrivee,
c.motif_residence            AS c_motif_residence,

c.adresse_rue                AS c_adresse_rue,
c.adresse_quartier           AS c_adresse_quartier,
c.adresse_ville              AS c_adresse_ville,
c.adresse_region             AS c_adresse_region,
c.adresse_pays               AS c_adresse_pays,

c.email                      AS c_email,
c.tel_mobile                 AS c_tel_mobile,
c.tel_fixe                   AS c_tel_fixe,
c.tel_whatsapp               AS c_tel_whatsapp,

c.banque_nom                 AS c_banque_nom,
c.banque_pays                AS c_banque_pays,
c.num_compte                 AS c_num_compte,

c.regime_fiscal              AS c_regime_fiscal,
c.statut                     AS c_statut,

c.created_at                 AS c_created_at,
c.updated_at                 AS c_updated_at,

-- =========================
-- PERSONNE MORALE
-- =========================
pm.nom_legal                 AS pm_nom_legal,
pm.nom_commercial            AS pm_nom_commercial,
pm.type_personne_morale      AS pm_type_personne_morale,
pm.forme_juridique           AS pm_forme_juridique,

pm.nif                       AS pm_nif,
pm.num_tva                   AS pm_num_tva,
pm.identifiant_unique_national AS pm_identifiant_unique,

pm.num_rc                    AS pm_num_rc,

pm.secteur_activite          AS pm_secteur_activite,
pm.secteur_activite_principal AS pm_secteur_principal,
pm.code_activite_isic        AS pm_code_isic,
pm.description_activite      AS pm_description_activite,

pm.date_debut_activite       AS pm_date_debut_activite,
pm.nb_employes               AS pm_nb_employes,

pm.email_officiel            AS pm_email_officiel,
pm.tel_fixe_2                AS pm_tel_fixe,

pm.site_web                  AS pm_site_web,

pm.regime_fiscal             AS pm_regime_fiscal

FROM datamatch.contribuable c

LEFT JOIN datamatch.personne_morale pm
       ON pm.contribuable_id = c.id

SELECT 
    c.*,
    pp.*
FROM datamatch.contribuable c
JOIN datamatch.personne_physique pp
    ON pp.contribuable_id = c.id
